caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap, and large black over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a boom arm that bears the text "Mackie MixMaster MX622". Behind him is a wall of dark grey acoustic foam panels. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and smiling, his facial expressions shifting from a neutral speaking pose to a wider grin. He gestures with his right arm, which reveals a tattoo on his upper arm. The camera remains stationary, capturing a medium shot of the man as he interacts with someone off-screen, while the equipment and setting remain constant throughout the clip.
